So, pretty much in a nutshell, we started uh in this industry about 11 years ago as a, as a stand alone I OS and we've really kind of evolved from there.
Um And ultimately, we've really kind of reshaped the way we've approached marketing and advertising our clients in the multifamily space.

But as we've come out of COVID, uh we're seeing that occupancy is starting to, to slide a little bit vacancy is a little bit more um volatile than it was maybe in peak COVID times.
And there's more saturation than there ever has been more new units, more competition on the market.
So it's getting a little bit more challenging to market units.

Um And we thought, you know, instead of doing the traditional type of uh uh advertising that most of our clients have done in in decades long in this industry by three or four or five various ils is try to figure out what works better at one property versus the other.
Maybe I bump up my spend with apartments.com and sometimes it works sometimes it doesn't and it's just kind of constantly going through the fly wheel.
